result.finding: Layered Monolith with MVC pattern. The application is a single deployable Spring Boot unit organized in domain-based packages (owner, vet, system, model), each containing Controllers, Repositories, and Entities — a classic layered/MVC architecture.
evidence: MVC structure: @Controller classes in owner/, vet/, system/ packages; Thymeleaf templates in templates/; Spring Data JPA repositories
Layered separation: Presentation (Controllers), Data Access (OwnerRepository, VetRepository), Domain (Owner, Pet, Visit, Vet, Specialty entities)
No Eureka/Consul/service discovery dependencies in pom.xml
No API gateway (Zuul, Spring Cloud Gateway) configuration
No multiple service directories or docker-compose multi-service configuration
